title: Hard Rock Harrigan
writer: Charles Furthman, Daniel Jarrett, Raymond L. Schrock
actors: George O'Brien, Irene Hervey, Fred Kohler
plot: Tim 'Hard Rock" Harrigan, a construction-crew driller working on the site of the Boulder Dam, is in a constant feud with his crew-boss "Black Jack" Riley, because of Harrigan's dislike of Riley's hard-as-nails management of the me...
